code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Security_ZeroTrust] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {Security_OAuth2] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {Security_IntrusionDetection] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {Security_Firewall] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [Security_OAuth2]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {Security_Encryption] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {Security_IntrusionDetection] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {Security_ZeroTrust] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [Security_IntrusionDetection]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {Security_Encryption] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [Security_Encryption]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {Security_Firewall] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [Security_OAuth2]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {Security_IntrusionDetection] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (Security_Encryption)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [Security_ZeroTrust]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [Security_Encryption]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们来设计这个宠物洗衣机的状态机吧。核心流程是：宠物创建后进入Idle状态，点击开始洗涤后进入Washing，洗完烘干，最后折叠完成。每个阶段都要有安全校验。
明白了。Idle到Washing的触发条件是"Start Wash Button"对吧？还有，我注意到安全层级不同——Idle入口用Security_ZeroTrust，但Washing内部用Security_OAuth2，这样设计是为了区分认证强度吗？
对，Idle是初始状态，零信任验证设备合法性。进入Washing后切换OAuth2进行用户会话管理。Washing内部要有嵌套状态：TimerRunning和TimerComplete。
好的，Washing的嵌套结构我画好了。TimerRunning里面还有一层SaveState和UpdateUI的循环，并且加了Security_IntrusionDetection。旁边我备注了UserDefaults存储的字段：endTime、type为.wash、还有petID。
TimerComplete的处理也要细化：CancelTimer之后ClearState，然后SendNotification，最后回到Security_OAuth2。这里用Security_Firewall保护状态清理过程。
TimerComplete画完了。Washing结束后到WashComplete，触发条件是"Timer Expires"。接下来是Drying阶段，结构类似Washing但安全层级用Security_Encryption？
没错，Drying用Security_Encryption保护数据传输。内部也是TimerRunning2和TimerComplete2，SaveState2存的是type为.dry。注意TimerComplete2的安全出口是Security_IntrusionDetection，和Washing不同。
Drying画好了，DryComplete之后进入Folding，触发条件是"Ready to Fold State"，用户点击后进入CycleComplete。这里我加了个备注说明WashComplete和DryComplete都会发通知。
CycleComplete是奖励阶段：UpdatePetHealth把health设为100，state改为.happy，更新lastLaundryDate和cyclesCompleted，还要处理streak。之后UpdateStats、ClearNotifications、SaveDatabase，闭环回Security_Encryption。
CycleComplete画完了，最后回到Idle。不过有个问题：如果App被杀掉再打开，怎么恢复状态？
好问题，需要RecoveryCheck状态。Washing和Drying都要能跳转到RecoveryCheck，触发条件是"App Reopened"。RecoveryCheck用Security_Firewall，先LoadUserDefaults，然后ValidateState，验证endTime是否存在、是否合理。
RecoveryCheck画好了。ValidateState之后CalculateActualRemaining，出口到Security_OAuth2。然后分支判断：Timer Still Running回Washing或Drying，Timer Expired到WashComplete或DryComplete，Corrupted的话回Idle。
还差健康度系统。Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete都会随时间进入HealthDecay，触发条件是"Time Passes"。HealthDecay用Security_IntrusionDetection，CheckLastLaundry后CalculateHealth。
CalculateHealth的逻辑我备注一下：daysSince除以cycleFrequencyDays，health按比例衰减。状态分级是Happy(100-75%)、Neutral(75-50%)、Sad(50-25%)、Very Sad(25-1%)，0%进入Dead。公式里有个Security_Encryption占位，需要确认吗？
啊，公式写错了，应该是health = 100 * (1 - daysSince/expected)，不是Security_Encryption。Security_Encryption是安全标签，不应该出现在计算公式里。UpdateState之后出口到Security_ZeroTrust。
已修正公式。HealthDecay之后，Health Updated回Idle，Health = 0进入Dead，Dead出口是Security_Encryption标记宠物死亡。Idle的备注我也加上了：无活动定时器、可开始洗涤、健康度持续衰减。
整体检查一遍：Washing的CalculateRemaining每0.5秒执行一次，remaining大于0回TimerRunning，小于等于0到TimerComplete。Drying的CalculateRemaining2逻辑一样吧？
对，CalculateRemaining2也是每0.5秒触发，逻辑相同。还有几个细节：Folding到CycleComplete的触发是"User Taps Fold"，Drying入口是"Start Dry Button"，这些都没问题吧？

都没问题。最后确认安全层级分布：Security_ZeroTrust用于Idle入口和HealthDecay出口，Security_OAuth2用于Washing入口和CalculateActualRemaining出口，Security_IntrusionDetection用于嵌套状态监控，Security_Firewall用于TimerComplete和RecoveryCheck，Security_Encryption用于Drying和CycleComplete。
完全对应。状态机已经完整：Idle → Washing → WashComplete → Drying → DryComplete → Folding → CycleComplete → Idle，加上RecoveryCheck恢复机制和HealthDecay健康系统，所有安全层级和备注都已标注。
